texto: The answer to what we're looking for, fixing the world with love, has to be traced back to something, and we can only trace it back to the God who is love. If we dive into the rest of Genesis and say, "What is this 'day' nonsense? As modern people, we can't believe that," then we have already missed the point. God has revealed to us through Moses the foundations of our desire for love and we want to talk about matter? When we lie in bed at night, do we miss matter or do we miss love? We miss love.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Zach Weihrauch que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “The answer to what we're looking for, fixing the world with love, has to be traced back to someth…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, creation, evolution, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
